title: posting.rs: self-mention generates spurious notification and push
description: File: src/posting.rs:1037-1070. When a user mentions themselves in a post (e.g., @alice posts 'Hello @alice'), the code creates both a DB notification and a push notification to the same user. The favourite and reblog paths correctly guard with 'post.account_id \!= auth.account_id' before notifying, but the local mention path at line 1037 has no such guard. Should add 'if aid \!= auth.account_id' before inserting the notification and spawning the push.
